milestones.title: Foundation & First Project
milestones.unlock_statement: Tanvir, you'll build and deploy a simple data pipeline using Python and SQL within the next 3 days, and explain the data flow to a friend without looking at notes.

milestones.title: Core Skills Unlocked
milestones.unlock_statement: You will design and implement a data warehouse using Pandas and SQL, and walk a non-technical friend through the database schema in 10 minutes without needing a visual aid.

milestones.title: Junior Data Engineer Ready
milestones.unlock_statement: Tanvir, you'll complete a data engineering challenge on a platform like Kaggle, and write a blog post about your approach and the insights you gained from the data, highlighting your use of Python and statistics.

milestones.title: Mid-Level Engineer
milestones.unlock_statement: You will lead a team project to build a real-time data pipeline, and present the architecture and trade-offs to a panel of senior engineers, demonstrating your expertise in data engineering and communication skills.

milestones.title: Senior Data Engineer
milestones.unlock_statement: Tanvir, you'll design and implement a large-scale data architecture for a company, and mentor junior engineers on the team, helping them overcome common data engineering challenges and improve their skills.

milestones.title: Technical Lead
milestones.unlock_statement: You will develop a strategic plan for data-driven decision making at a company, and present it to the executive team, highlighting the benefits of data engineering and the impact on business outcomes, using your knowledge of statistics and data analysis.

milestones.title: Executive Role
milestones.unlock_statement: Tanvir, you'll be responsible for driving business growth through data-driven innovation, and will be recognized as a thought leader in the industry, speaking at conferences and publishing articles on data engineering and its applications, and inspiring others with your vision and expertise.
